title: brunyera biennis
intro: Brunyera biennis, also known as Brunyera, is a plant species belonging to the family Icacinaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Brunyera biennis has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and rheumatism, due to its ability to stimulate the release of mucus and reduce inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to support respiratory health and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
